properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You came down from heaven's throne, This earth you formed was not your home A love like this the world had never known, A crown of thorns to mock your name, Forgiveness fell upon your face, A love like this the world had never known.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: On the altar of our praise let there be no higher name Jesus son of God You laid down your perfect life You are the sacrifice Jesus son of God You are Jesus, son of God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You took our sin, You bore our shame, You rose to life, You defeated the grave, Love like this the world has never known.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Be lifted higher than all you've overcome, Your name be louder than any other song, There is no power that can come against your love, The cross was enough, The cross was enough.
